DASHBOARD.descrizione: Hardware monitoring and AI backend status.

comandi.vram: Displays VRAM details and GPU load.

FILE_MANAGER.descrizione: System file and directory management with user path and file reading support.

comandi.list:path: Lists files and folders (e.g., list:desktop, list:core, list:plugins).
comandi.count:path: Provides a detailed count of items in a folder.
comandi.read:path: Reads the content of a text file (configurable lines).

HELP.descrizione: Displays the list of all active commands and modules in the system.

comandi.refresh: Regenerates the plugin registry and shows updated commands.

MEMORY.descrizione: Access to the Vault of memories and Admin profile (Identity and History).

comandi.remember:text: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.
comandi.who_am_i: Ask Zentra to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI.
comandi.read:n: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.
comandi.reset: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire chat history.

ROLEPLAY.descrizione: Manages roleplay mode: loads characters and scenes for immersive conversations.

comandi.load:nome: Loads the specified character (e.g., load: wizard).
comandi.unload: Deactivates roleplay and returns to normal personality.

SYSTEM.descrizione: Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics, system utilities.

comandi.reboot: Immediate Cold Reboot of the core.
comandi.terminal: Opens a new CMD Prompt window.
comandi.read log: Reads the latest logged system events.
comandi.errors: Analyzes only the latest crashes or failures.
comandi.open:program: Opens a default program (notepad, chrome, visual studio, sillytavern).
comandi.explore:path: Opens a folder in Explorer (e.g., explore:desktop, explore:download).
comandi.config:set:section,key,value: Updates a config.json entry (use with care).

SYSTEM.esempio: [SYSTEM: read log] or [SYSTEM: terminal] or [SYSTEM: time]

WEB.descrizione: Network access for Google searches and quick opening of websites.

comandi.search:query: Executes a Google search for the specified term.
comandi.open:url: Opens a web address in the default browser.

WEB.esempio: [WEB: search: chi è Root Admin] oppure [WEB: open: youtube.com]

WEBCAM.descrizione: Access to PC optical vision to take snapshots of the environment or Admin.

comandi.snap: Activates the camera and saves an image in the 'scatti' folder.

MODELS.descrizione: Changes the AI model based on the active backend (Ollama/Kobold).

comandi.set:numero: Changes the active model using the list number (e.g., set:7).
comandi.lista: Displays available models for the current backend.
